calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Shipman (Petitioner) in propria persona.

John Shipman sworn in open court.

Stipulation that Commissioner may act as Judge Pro Tempore signed by Petitioner and filed in court.

The matter came on calendar for the regularly scheduled hearing for orders to stop elder or dependent adult abuse. There being no appearance by the Respondent Adam Hill; John Shipman, sworn witness testifies. Upon conclusion of testimony, the Petitioner's request for a restraining order is granted as follows:

No contact, 50 yard stay away from the person and residence including move-out order, no guns. The order will expire midnight on November 17, 2011 (order signed in open court).

Department 318. Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#. Clerk: J. Alameda/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Guitron.
